description_long: This is a large, open-frame bookcase featuring a modern, minimalist design with a combination of white and wood finishes. The structure consists of four horizontal shelves supported by vertical metal or painted supports, with the bottom shelf being a deeper, wood-textured compartment that may serve as additional storage. The upper three shelves are thinner and appear to be made of a lighter material, likely painted wood or laminate. The vertical supports are evenly spaced, providing both stability and a clean, geometric aesthetic. The overall look is sleek and functional, suitable for urban environments such as offices, libraries, or public waiting areas. The bookcase is designed to be floor-standing and can accommodate a variety of books or display items.
description: A large, modern floor-standing bookcase with four horizontal shelves and a wood-textured base, supported by white and black vertical frames. Its minimalist design combines white and wood finishes for a sleek, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four shelves, the wood-textured base, and the full width of the bookcase.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the shelves and the depth of the wood-textured base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bookcase, with the wood-textured base and vertical supports visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same thin profile and shelf arrangement as the other side.
